title: MD
biography: Rhazes (Muhammad ibn Zakariya al-Razi) was a Persian physician who was the first to distinguish smallpox from measles, and his medical encyclopedia Al-Hawi was used as a standard text in European medical schools for centuries.
aiSummary: Rhazes is a medicine specialist at Muqtadari Hospital. Based in Rey.
techniquesInvented: Clinical differentiation of smallpox and measles

citations.title: Geostatistical Modeling using Ordinary Kriging for Estimating Nickel Resources in Sulawesi Indonesia
citations.journal: Journal of Multidisciplinary Applied Natural Science

citations.title: Application of the Global Estimation Variance and Sill Variogram Methods in Determining the Optimum Drill Hole Distance for the classification of Measured Coal Resources

timeline.title: Distinguished smallpox from measles
timeline.description: Published the first clinical differentiation between these two diseases

timeline.title: Al-Hawi encyclopedia
timeline.description: Compiled the comprehensive medical encyclopedia that became a standard reference in Europe
